'''Rice Bowl''' is a food item that gives you 2.5 hunger points.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Rice bowl.png
| id = rice_bowl
| type = Food
| Subtype = Rice
| Properties = Hunger points: 2.5/10
| stackable = 64
| Description = White, Steamy and Fluffy!
}}Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==

=== Smelting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!(Smelting, Campfire, Smoker) Recipe
|-
|[[Uncooked Rice in a Bowl]]
|[[File:Rice bowl crafting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.

==Used In==
*[[Training Treat]]
*[[Natto Rice]]
*[[Sake Nigiri Sushi]]
*[[Onigiri]]
*[[Gyudon]]
*[[Oyakodon]]
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
